---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for FS25 RoleplayPhone
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: MarlboroRedMan
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I wish I could...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
